sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40308" key="e)pinefeli/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπινεφελ-ίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n40308.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cloudiness</tr_> in the eye, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
